items.statusDetails:
AssertionError: 403 Forbidden: Responding with 403 status code due to failed CSRF check: authenticated POST request is made, but neither tc-csrf-token parameter nor X-TC-CSRF-Token header are provided. Consider deleting existing cookies associated with TeamCity domain and using Bearer Token authentication for you requests (such requests don't return session cookies).
  
assert 403 in (200, 201)
 +  where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
